agents.description: Reviews implementation code for the dev-pipeline skill. Catches bugs, security issues, missed requirements, and convention violations
agents.name: pipeline-code-reviewer

agents.description: Implements specific work units from an approved plan. Reads existing code, follows project conventions, and makes precise changes
agents.name: pipeline-coder

agents.description: Final quality gate — verifies the task is 100% complete by checking implementation against requirements, plan, and all review feedback
agents.name: pipeline-completeness-checker

agents.description: Cleans and optimizes code after implementation is complete. Removes dead code, debug artifacts, unused imports, and duplicated logic
agents.name: pipeline-optimizer

agents.description: Critically reviews implementation plans. Catches missing integration points, incorrect parallelism, and architectural issues
agents.name: pipeline-plan-reviewer

agents.description: Creates detailed, parallelizable implementation plans. Breaks tasks into independent work units with clear file paths and dependencies
agents.name: pipeline-planner

agents.description: Explores codebases and researches domains. Gathers context about project structure, patterns, conventions, and external domain knowledge
agents.name: pipeline-researcher

agents.description: Reviews test coverage completeness. Identifies untested functions, missing code paths, and gaps in edge case coverage
agents.name: pipeline-test-coverage-reviewer

agents.description: Reviews test quality. Evaluates whether tests are meaningful, independent, well-structured, and would catch real regressions
agents.name: pipeline-test-quality-reviewer

agents.description: Writes comprehensive tests — unit tests, edge case tests, and integration tests following project conventions
agents.name: pipeline-test-writer

skills.description: Full autonomous development pipeline — research, plan, code, review, test — with multi-agent orchestration
skills.name: dev-pipeline

skills.description: Polishes existing code to meet specific completion criteria — runs tests, iterates fixes with review, optimizes code
skills.name: polish-pipeline

description: Full development pipeline — autonomous coding, reviewing, testing, and research agents with orchestrating skills
name: mz-dev-pipe
